originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Implementing Adaptive Gamma for Advantage and Porting INF Warfare Renderer to 3D
summary: Developed a novel advantage estimation method replacing GAE's fixed gamma/lambda with a learned vector of gamma values per timestep, using variance to weight rewards. Code-reviewed Captain's Box2D game code, then ported the renderer from 2D to 3D using Raylib.
